stemHtml: Its a cold day, the pilot did not do de-ice nor anti-ice the aircraft. How will ice accretion affect the aircraft performance?

options.a: The drag will increase due to contamination, but the aircraft will take off normally.
options.b: The drag will increase, it is fine as long the aircraft can become airborne.
options.c: The drag will increase due to contamination and C<sub>LMAX</sub> will reduce.
options.d: Stall speed increases, the drag decreases.
